revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:March 4 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of March 4 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦3月4日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[1053年]]_月_日） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[1771年]]_月_日） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（[[1788年]]_月_日） - [[徳川家斉]]が老中[[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * （[[1796年]]_月_日） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化]]3年（[[1806年]]_月_日） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（[[1837年]]_月_日） - 前年からの天保の大飢饉の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（[[1863年]]_月_日） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]]_月_日） - 明治政府が円貨の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（[[1697年]]_月_日） - [[賀茂真淵]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月3日 (旧暦)|3月3日]] 翌日[[3月5日 (旧暦)|3月5日]] - 前月[[2月4日 (旧暦)|2月4日]] 翌月[[4月4日 (旧暦)|4月4日]] *新暦[[3月4日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦3月4日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。 {{msg:旧暦3月}}
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[1053年]]_月_日） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶]]元年（[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化]]3年（[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月3日 (旧暦)|3月3日]] 翌日[[3月5日 (旧暦)|3月5日]] - 前月[[2月4日 (旧暦)|2月4日]] 翌月[[4月4日 (旧暦)|4月4日]] *新暦[[3月4日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦3月4日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。 {{msg:旧暦3月}}

== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月3日 (旧暦)|3月3日]] 翌日[[3月5日 (旧暦)|3月5日]] - 前月[[2月4日 (旧暦)|2月4日]] 翌月[[4月4日 (旧暦)|4月4日]] *新暦[[3月4日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月4日'''（きゅうれきさんがつよっか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月4日'''（きゅうれきさんがつよっか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==

== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月4日'''（きゅうれきさんがつよっか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月4日'''（きゅうれきさんがつよっか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）

{{Lunar March}} '''Lunar March4日'''（きゅうれきさんがつよっか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

[[sn:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[天喜]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1053]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1771]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1796]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== Births == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769]]）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==

== Births == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769]]）

[[sn:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[天喜]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1053]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1771]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1788]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1796]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1837]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== Births == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769]]）

[[sn:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[天喜]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1053]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1771]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1788]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1796]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1806]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1837]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1863]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== Births == * [[元禄]]10th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1697]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769]]）
== Deaths ==

== Events == * [[天喜]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1053]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]]8th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1771]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1788]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1796]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1806]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}8th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1837]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}}3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1863]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1869]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]]10th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1697]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769]]）

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[3月26日]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[4月18日]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[老中]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[4月11日]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[4月22日]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[4月8日]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[4月21日]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[二条城]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[4月15日]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[4月24日]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[国学者]] （+ [[1769]] ）
== Deaths ==

[[sn:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[老中]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[二条城]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[国学者]] （+ [[1769]] ）

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[老中]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[二条城]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[国学者]] （+ [[1769]] ）

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[老中]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[二条城]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[国学者]] （+ [[1769]] ）

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[老中]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[二条城]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[老中]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[二条城]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[国学者]] （+ [[1769]] ）

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[sn:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

[[sn:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[清]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230th year ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[Qing dynasty]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230th year ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[Qing dynasty]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230th year ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

[[sn:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[Qing dynasty]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230th year ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[Qing dynasty]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230th year ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Pages to be translated]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:Pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1053]] [[March 26]] ） - [[藤原頼通]] による宇治・[[平等院]] 阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[Meiwa]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1771]] [[April 18]] ） - [[杉田玄白]] ・[[前野良沢]] らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1788]] [[April 9]] ） - [[徳川家斉]] が[[Rōjū]] [[松平定信]] を将軍補佐とする。[[Kanseiの改革]] が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[April 11]] ） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]] 。[[Qing dynasty]] で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1806]] [[April 22]] ） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1837]] [[April 8]] ） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]] の為、Tokugawa shogunateが江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1863]] [[April 21]] ） - [[徳川家茂]] が京都の[[Nijō Castle]] に入る。3代家光以来230th year ぶり * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[April 15]] ） - 明治政府が[[円貨]] の制度を定める
== Births == * [[Genroku]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1697]] [[April 24]] ） - [[賀茂真淵]] <ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}} </ref>、[[Kokugakuist]] （+ [[1769]] ）
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}
<!--March 4 (lunar calendar)-->
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]]

{{draft categories| [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]][[sn:March 4 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category: pages]] [[Category: deprecated open]] [[Category: deprecated close]] [[Category:q]] [[Category:Lunisolar March]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Days 4 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:ngoodbye $1 most likely u]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 4일]] [[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:三月初四]] [[en:draft:March 4 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[en:3月4日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:March 4 (lunar calendar)]] [[sn:arch 4 (lunar calendar)]] [[sn:arch 4 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1053]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[Meiwa]] 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1771]] {{ill|April 18|ja|4月18日}}) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1788]] {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}}) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1796]] {{ill|April 11|ja|4月11日}}) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1806]] {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}}) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1837]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1863]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日}}) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1697]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日}}) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>) (died [[1769]]).
== Deaths == <!-- No deaths listed -->
== Commemorations == <!-- No commemorations listed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]]

== Events == * [[天喜]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1053]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[Meiwa]] 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1771]] {{ill|April 18|ja|4月18日}}) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[Tenmei]] 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1788]] {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}}) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1796]] {{ill|April 11|ja|4月11日}}) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[Bunka]] 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1806]] {{ill|April 22|ja|4月22日}}) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1837]] {{ill|April 8|ja|4月8日}}) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * {{ill|Bunkyū|ja|文久|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1863]] {{ill|April 21|ja|4月21日}}) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1872]] {{ill|April 16|ja|4月16日}}) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1697]] {{ill|April 24|ja|4月24日}}) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>) (died [[1769]]).
== Deaths == <!-- No deaths listed -->
== Commemorations == <!-- No commemorations listed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月4日'''（きゅうれきさんがつよっか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の4日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[天喜]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1053年]][[3月26日]]） - [[藤原頼通]]による宇治・[[平等院]]阿弥陀堂（鳳凰堂）が完成 * [[明和]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1771年]][[4月18日]]） - [[杉田玄白]]・[[前野良沢]]らが死刑囚の解剖を見学。翌日から『ターヘル・アナトミア』の翻訳にとりかかる * [[天明]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1788年]][[4月9日]]） - [[徳川家斉]]が[[老中]][[松平定信]]を将軍補佐とする。[[寛政の改革]]が始まる * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[4月11日]]） - [[白蓮教徒の乱]]。[[清]]で農民による弥勒信仰結社・白蓮教徒が叛乱 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1806年]][[4月22日]]） - 江戸で[[文化の大火]] * [[天保]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1837年]][[4月8日]]） - 前年からの[[天保の大飢饉]]の為、江戸幕府が江戸の各地に救米小屋を設置 * [[文久]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1863年]][[4月21日]]） - [[徳川家茂]]が京都の[[二条城]]に入る。3代家光以来230年ぶり * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[4月15日]]） - 明治政府が[[円貨]]の制度を定める
== 誕生日 == * [[元禄]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1697年]][[4月24日]]） - [[賀茂真淵]]<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03}}</ref>、[[国学者]]（+ [[1769年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月初四]][[zh:三月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838975]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 4|qq=March 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:天喜|天喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1053|1053]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[:en:Meiwa|Meiwa]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1771|1771]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.

the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:天喜|天喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1053|1053]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[:en:Meiwa|Meiwa]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1771|1771]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304|qq=}}

the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初四]][[zh:三月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838975]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 4|qq=March 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:天喜|天喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1053|1053]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[:en:Meiwa|Meiwa]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1771|1771]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初四]]
{{translated page|ja|3月4日 (旧暦)|version=97040529|comment=Imported full ja history}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初四]][[zh:三月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838975]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 4|qq=March 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:天喜|天喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1053|1053]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[:en:Meiwa|Meiwa]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1771|1771]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初四]][[zh:三月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838975]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 4|qq=March 4}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:天喜|天喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1053|1053]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[:en:Meiwa|Meiwa]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1771|1771]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:天喜|天喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1053|1053]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[:en:Meiwa|Meiwa]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1771|1771]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==

the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|3|3|5|2|4|4|3|0304|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月初四]][[zh:三月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月初四]][[zh:三月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初四]][[zh:三月初四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838975]] Wikidata name: 4th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 4|qq=March 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:天喜|天喜]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1053|1053]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – The great Amitābha Hall (鳳凰堂) at Heidōin (平等院) in Uji was completed under the direction of Fujiwara Yorimichi. * [[:en:Meiwa|Meiwa]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1771|1771]] [[:en:April 18|April 18]]) – Sugita Genpaku and Maeno Ryōtaku observed the dissection of condemned prisoners; the very next day they began translating the work “Tahel Anatomia.” * [[:en:Tenmei|Tenmei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1788|1788]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – Tokugawa Iezawa appointed Matsudaira Sadatoki as his shōgun’s assistant (補佐), marking the beginning of the Kansei reforms. * [[嘉慶 (中国)|嘉慶]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1796|1796]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – In the Qing dynasty, a rebellion was triggered by a group of Bai Lian (White Lotus) adherents—peasant groups forming a Maitreya-based religious association. * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1806|1806]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – A great fire, known as the “Great Cultural Fire,” broke out in Edo. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1837|1837]] [[:en:April 8|April 8]]) – Due to the Great Tenpō Famine, the Tokugawa shogunate established rice relief granaries throughout Edo. * [[:en:Bunkyū|Bunkyū]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1863|1863]] [[:en:April 21|April 21]]) – Tokugawa Iemochi entered Nijō Castle in Kyoto, the first time in 230 years since Shōkō had reigned. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]]) – At Sunpu Castle, Tetsusaburō Yamaoka met with Saigō Takamori, appealing with a spirit of submission to save the Tokugawa family. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:April 16|April 16]]) – The soldiers safeguarding the emperor—10,000 strong from the Satsuma, Chōshū, and Tosa domains—were re-designated as the Konoei.
== Births == * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1697|1697]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – Kamo Mafuchi, a Kokugaku scholar (<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://mabuchi-kinenkan.jp/history/index.html|title=賀茂真淵について|publisher=賀茂真淵記念館|accessdate=2021-05-03|qq=}}</ref>) (died [[:en:1769|1769]]). == Deaths ==
